name: Hugging Face Chat
data_egress_concerns: Prompts sent through the Inference API reach various open-source model endpoints with differing privacy guarantees
Model fine-tuning datasets uploaded to Hub may contain proprietary or sensitive training data
Spaces and repositories may inadvertently expose internal models, datasets, or API keys
Conversations through HuggingChat use open-source models but data may be logged for service improvement
training_use_default: HuggingChat conversations may be shared publicly and used for model improvement unless users opt out. Enterprise Hub provides private inference with contractual controls. Self-hosted inference avoids data egress entirely.
